texto: It were indeed to be wish'd that our art had been less ingenious, in contriving means destructive to mankind; we mean those instruments of war, which were unknown to the ancients, and have made such havoc among the moderns. But as men have always been bent on seeking each other's destruction by continual wars; and as force, when brought against us, can only be repelled by force; the chief support of war, must, after money, be now sought in chemistry.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hermann Boerhaave sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “It were indeed to be wish'd that our art had been less ingenious, in contriving means destructive…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, chemistry, destruction, útil em momentos de destruction e mankind.
